mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID AS userId, USERNAME AS username, USER_NAME AS displayName, DEPARTMENT AS department, TEAM AS team, POSITION AS position FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT USER_ID AS userId, USERNAME AS username, PWD AS pwd, USER_NAME AS displayName, DEPARTMENT AS department, TEAM AS team, POSITION AS position FROM USERS WHERE USERNAME = #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( USERNAME, PWD, USER_NAME, DEPARTMENT, TEAM, POSITION ) VALUES ( #{username, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pwd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{displayName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{department, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{team, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{position, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
